meta.name: Customer Health Scorer
meta.description: Calculate a composite health score for each account based on usage, support, NPS, and engagement signals. Identify at-risk accounts proactively.

parameters.content:
## 33 — Customer Health Scorer

**Required:**
- HEALTH_SHEET_ID: columns customer_id, company, segment, mrr, login_days_30d, features_used, support_tickets_30d, nps_score, days_since_last_login, contract_end_date
- HEALTH_AT_RISK_THRESHOLD: score below which account is at-risk (default: 50)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Weekly on Sunday at 20:00
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: ❤️ Customer Health {{ $json.week }}: {{ $json.critical_count }} critical, {{ $json.at_risk_count }} at-risk / {{ $json.total }} accounts
